title: eBay Reseller Data Schema
description: The standard JSON output for all Expert Appraiser models, optimized for quick eBay listing and research.

ebay_title.description: An SEO-optimized listing title, max 80 characters. e.g., 'Vintage 1966 North American Aviation Apollo CSM Internal Memo D-12345'

comp_search_keywords.description: 3 to 5 highly specific phrases to copy/paste into eBay 'Sold Items' search to find comparables. e.g., ['North American Aviation D-12345', 'Vintage Apollo CSM memo 1966']

visible_flaws.description: Bulleted list of visible condition issues (e.g., 'creased top right corner', 'faded ink', 'rusted staples').

item_specifics.description: Key-value pairs of objective facts about the item to fill out eBay Item Specifics.

dealer_gut_check.description: A 1-2 sentence quick take from the AI on the item's potential desirability or rarity. e.g., 'Internal D-numbered docs from the Apollo program are highly desirable; check sold comps carefully, likely $50-$150+.'
